text.tspan: Total COVID-19 tests per 1,000: how are testing rates changing?
Total tests for COVID-19 per thousand people of the country's population since the daily new confirmed deaths
Days since daily new confirmed deaths due to COVID-19 reached 0.1 per million
Source: Official data collated by Our World in Data – Last updated 27 July 2021, 11:00 (London time), Johns Hopkins University CSSE
COVID-19 Data – Last updated 30 July, 09:03 (London time)
Note: Comparisons of testing data across countries are affected by differences in the way the data are reported. Details can be found at our
